message: Refined generated Ultragoal plan to the five approved RALPLAN implementation stories from the handoff.

evidence: Added boundary and mixed selection coverage in tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts; pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts passed (7 tests).

verification.evidence: Targeted Live Preview/no-regex suite passed (8 files, 63 tests); lint passed; typecheck passed; full test suite passed (51 files, 260 tests); perf smoke passed ({itemCount:10000,resultCount:1355,durationMs:2.05,budgetMs:200}); knip passed after cleanup; git diff --check passed.

codeReview.evidence: Final independent review gate clean: code-reviewer reported APPROVE with no issues; architect reported CLEAR with only non-blocking watch recommendations.

codeReviewer.evidence: APPROVE; CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW none; reviewed scoped git diff, DOM safety, fallback patterns, and ran fresh pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, git diff --check, and targeted tests (5 files/41 tests).

architect.evidence: CLEAR; no public API leak; selection/clipboard/no-atomic policy internally consistent after Lezer migration; strongest counterargument about declarative metadata judged non-blocking because private and test-backed.
